Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xCC29 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Sabre Wulf.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $046f lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Sabre Wulf.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Inserted RLE packed colour RAM data to dump file at $046F to restore before showing the loading screen. Also added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
